textByHash.aa1cfe19d3c0b4153f3d1b6a0de4fdf40e56713b: You haven't been here long I take it.
textByHash.25563f2a79aef20d89717a04203b2c80307cf204: Do you know the life expectancy of a Falador guard?
textByHash.f2b15e64b324dcf12ac5b4446c0535e8f88d6dbc: Any second now someone is going to try and kill us, for no apparent reason, completely unprovoked.
textByHash.9eb1976f93b79b638c14769bc36779750f5d143c: But I'm not wasting my final seconds worrying about it.
textByHash.23b6c0f76e881f52613ebd1659bcc20a468e3bf9: Steady, Billy - remember you are a guard of Falador.
textByHash.e003e179d76f0aa6004767d0d603bd0576ed7d65: See you in the next world...
